problem_text: Evaluate the definite integral  integral_0^1 arctan(x) dx.

content.label: LIATE choice on a lone inverse-trig factor
content.applies_when: the arctan is the integrand (this is not an integral that produces an arctan), so by LIATE let u = arctan x (Inverse-trig) and dv = dx

content.label: Integration by parts
content.symbolic: integral u dv = u*v - integral v du

content.meaning: u = arctan x (du = 1/(1 + x^2) dx) and dv = dx (v = x)

content.concept: w = 1 + x^2 for the leftover integral
content.meaning: for integral x/(1 + x^2) dx substitute w = 1 + x^2 (dw = 2x dx), giving (1/2) ln(1 + x^2)

content.label: Apply the parts formula
content.action: apply integral u dv = uv - integral v du: x arctan x - integral x/(1 + x^2) dx
content.purpose: trade the inverse-trig integrand for a rational one

content.label: Evaluate the leftover integral
content.action: evaluate integral x/(1 + x^2) dx = (1/2) ln(1 + x^2) via w = 1 + x^2
content.purpose: finish the rational integral so the antiderivative is complete

content.label: Evaluate at the limits
content.action: the antiderivative is x arctan x - (1/2) ln(1 + x^2); evaluate 0 to 1: pi/4 - (1/2) ln 2
content.purpose: produce the numerical value of the definite integral
